attributes.title: [CockroachDB OTel] Overview
attributes.description: Cluster health, availability, and golden signals for CockroachDB. Covers live nodes, replication status, SQL throughput, errors, CPU, and storage.

This dashboard provides cluster health and golden signals:
- Live nodes and replication status (unavailable/under-replicated ranges)
- SQL throughput and connection counts
- Error rates (failures, aborts, contention)
- CPU and memory utilization
- Storage capacity and LSM health indicators
